candidates.faers_interpretation: 2 FAERS report(s) mention both Flupentixol and Bipolar disorder-related terms. Minimal real-world signal.
candidates.signature_interpretation: Flupentixol was not found among the top 34 drugs that reverse the Bipolar disorder gene signature. Top reversers: geldanamycin (1.542), NICLOSAMIDE (1.540), 5374640 (1.519)
